title: Whitepapper | Markdown-First Content Platform for Developers
description: Whitepapper is a markdown-first content platform for developers who want to write once, publish across channels, and serve content through a fast read API.

acceptedAnswer.text: Whitepapper is an SEO-first content engine for developers to publish and distribute technical content.

mainEntity.name: How does Whitepapper improve SEO and GEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Whitepapper provides canonical metadata defaults, structured data, sitemap endpoints, robots controls, and LLM-focused context documents.
